mapper.sql: select id, biz_code, field_key, field_label, field_type, component_type, required, default_value, dict_type, upload_config, field_ext, validate_rule, stage, is_query, is_list, is_detail, is_process_var, process_var_name, parent_field_key, order_num, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from lc_biz_field
mapper.select: where biz_code = #{bizCode} and del_flag = '0' order by order_num asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into lc_biz_field( biz_code, field_key, field_label, field_type, component_type, required, default_value, dict_type, upload_config, field_ext, validate_rule, stage, is_query, is_list, is_detail, is_process_var, process_var_name, parent_field_key, order_num, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{bizCode}, #{fieldKey}, #{fieldLabel}, #{fieldType}, #{componentType}, #{required}, #{defaultValue}, #{dictType}, #{uploadConfig}, #{fieldExt}, #{validateRule}, #{stage}, #{isQuery}, #{isList}, #{isDetail}, #{isProcessVar}, #{processVarName}, #{parentFieldKey}, #{orderNum}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update lc_biz_field set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
